perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a vibrant graphic overlay featuring the Costco logo, a cartoon character, and text indicating a weekly special report. (2) It then transitions into a rapid sequence of shots within a Costco warehouse, showing products such as frozen meat, milk powder, strawberry cakes, rice potato crisps, egg rolls, snack packs, chocolates, and chewing gum. (3) The sequence continues with various other items including biscuits, crackers, granola bars, jelly, spicy snacks, chocolate balls, bottled tea, rice crackers, soda crackers, Milo drinks, yogurt, and household items like sponges, detergent, and shampoo. (4) Each shot focuses on the product packaging and its placement on the shelves or in refrigerators.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Energetic and fast-paced background music begins immediately and maintains a consistent tempo throughout the video. (2) A male voice speaks rapidly and enthusiastically, announcing the names of the products and their discounted prices in Mandarin. (3) Subtle ambient noise from the warehouse environment, such as the hum of refrigerators or distant store sounds, is occasionally audible beneath the music and narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional and Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE 好市多 每週特價速報 11/10-11/16' appears as a hook to announce the weekly specials. (2) Functional Text: Each product showcased has specific text overlays including the product name (e.g., '台灣冷凍豬梅花火鍋片'), original price ('原價415/KG'), discount amount ('-86'), and special price ('特價329/KG'). (3) Decorative/Hook Text: '記得追蹤我們' (Remember to follow us) appears at the bottom as a call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a rapid-fire product list format, showcasing a wide variety of discounted items one after another.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator whose hands are occasionally visible while filming
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An off-screen male narrator/shopper whose hands are seen interacting with or pointing towards products.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Different aisles and refrigerated sections of a large warehouse-style retail store, filled with bulk-packaged goods on metal shelving and pallets.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, industrial indoor lighting typical of a warehouse.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Systematic Product Display -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional shopping guide, aiming to inform Costco members in Taiwan about specific weekly discounts across a wide range of food, beverage, and household products to encourage store visits during the promotional period.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to showcasing Costco products with their current promotional prices.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced narration style with consistent price tag graphic overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-intensity editing style common in 'deal-hunting' social media content, focusing on value and urgency.
